danger_signals.visual_form: Armed humanoid figures, military/corporate uniforms, visible weapons
Environmental decay, quarantine markers, biohazard symbolism in world design
danger_signals.meaning: Global crisis context; restricted zones, desperation in NPC behavior

danger_signals.visual_form: Cybernetic enhancements visible on enemies, non-standard armor, advanced weaponry
danger_signals.meaning: High-threat faction opposition; enemies with superhuman abilities

danger_signals.visual_form: Illuminati symbols, corporate logos, restricted access areas with faction insignia
danger_signals.meaning: Political/narrative danger; player is being hunted or manipulated

safety_signals.visual_form: Civilian clothing, domestic environments, lack of weaponry visible
UNATCO headquarters, friendly NPC positioning, faction-aligned architecture
safety_signals.meaning: Temporary safety; can access resources and briefings

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: UNATCO logo/insignia on uniforms and structures
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Militarized compounds, command centers, branded architecture

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Military-grade equipment, insurgent uniforms, asymmetric combat gear
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Underground bases, hidden facilities, resistance strongholds

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: High-tech augmented agents, corporate elite appearance, advanced gear
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Hidden chambers, elite facilities, obscured locations

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Corporate security forces, business-formal with tactical gear
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Office spaces converted to military use, corporate headquarters

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Environmental contamination markers, quarantine zones, disease-related decay in urban environments, checkpoint barriers
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: NPCs exhibit panic or fear behaviors; restricted movement; urgency in dialogue; desperation in civilian interactions

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Hidden Illuminati symbols appearing in restricted areas; secret passages; coded messages; faction conflicts visible in public spaces
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: NPCs become suspicious or evasive; faction members track player; heightened security patrols

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Augmented vs. non-augmented visual distinction; segregated areas; propaganda posters; faction recruitment material
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Dialogue reflects prejudice; augmented characters treated as threats; faction recruitment attempts

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Checkpoints, guard posts, military hardware, barricades, surveillance cameras, heavy armor on NPCs
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Aggressive patrol behavior; weapon-ready stance; demands for identification; shoot-on-sight protocols in some zones

environmental_storytelling.example: UNATCO facilities feature militarized, ordered design; NSF spaces show improvisation and asymmetric warfare aesthetics; corporate spaces blend luxury with security theater
Illuminati pyramid and eye symbols appear hidden in restricted areas, revealing player's progress in uncovering the conspiracy
Environmental degradation, warning signage, biohazard markers, and abandoned spaces communicate the global crisis state without exposition
Faction alignment visible through NPC placement, uniforms, and proximity; enemy positioning reveals patrol routes and security priorities
Mechanical limbs, glowing enhancements, and tech-integrated armor visually distinguish augmented characters as both player allies and targets

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Weapon-ready stance, aggressive patrol, shoot-on-sight if player lacks credentials or enters restricted areas
Cover-based combat, use of unconventional tactics, recruitment dialogue with player if alignment permits
Advanced augmented abilities displayed, strategic positioning, communication about conspiracy objectives
Avoidant of combat zones, express anxiety about pandemic and political situation, seek safety
Display superhuman movement and combat capabilities, coordinate with faction forces, aggressive engagement

notes: Deus Ex communicates world-state primarily through environmental design, NPC faction identity markers (uniform/insignia), and augmentation visual language. The conspiracy narrative manifests through hidden symbols and restricted access zones. Political situation (pandemic + faction conflict + augmentation discrimination) is conveyed via environmental decay, checkpoint architecture, and NPC dialogue/behavior rather than explicit UI elements. The game's immersive sim design means world-state communication is embedded in level design choice rather than abstracted HUD elements.
